subcodes.first_line: O Jalál! The All-Sufficient, the Most Exalted, maketh mention of thee from the precincts of His Most Great Prison, that thou mayest render thanks unto thy Lord, the Almighty, the All-Bountiful. Verily He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا جلال یذکرک الغنی المتعال من شطر سجنه الاعظم لتشکر ربک العزیز الوهاب انه
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
